columns.extraction_plan: The text states "790 patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were equally randomly assigned to receive either ADT in combination with docetaxel 75 mg/m² for up to six cycles or ADT alone." This implies two arms. Treatment Arm 1 (ADT + docetaxel): Find the number of patients assigned to "ADT plus docetaxel" from the CONSORT diagram on page 2 (n=397). Treatment Arm 2 (ADT alone): Find the number of patients assigned to "ADT alone" from the CONSORT diagram on page 2 (n=393).
